languages.text: {n}Не произнося ни слова, Эоганн протягивает к несчастному мехадендрит с выдвинутым инъектором, вводя тому в шею неизвестную вам золотистую жидкость. Лицо манипулуса застыло в маске глубочайшей печали.{/n}

{n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Не произнося ни слова, Эоганн протягивает к несчастному мехадендрит с выдвинутым инъектором, вводя тому в шею неизвестную вам золотистую жидкость. Лицо манипулуса застыло в маске глубочайшей печали.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite with a bared injector toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of the deepest sorrow.{/n}

{n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite with a bared injector toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of the deepest sorrow.{/n}

{n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

{n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sin decir palabra, Eogunn extiende una mecadendrita con el inyector expuesto hacia el pobre hombre y le administra un líquido dorado en el cuello. El rostro del manipulus es una máscara de la pena más profunda.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sin decir palabra, Eogunn extiende una mecadendrita con el inyector expuesto hacia el pobre hombre y le administra un líquido dorado en el cuello. El rostro del manipulus es una máscara de la pena más profunda.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡一言不发，只是伸出一根机械触须，将注射器刺向那可怜的家伙，把一种未知的金色液体注入他的脖颈。操纵者的脸上写满了无尽的悲伤。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡一言不发，只是伸出一根机械触须，将注射器刺向那可怜的家伙，把一种未知的金色液体注入他的脖颈。操纵者的脸上写满了无尽的悲伤。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fährt wortlos einen mit einem Injektor versehenen Mechadendriten aus und injiziert der armen Seele eine unbekannte goldene Flüssigkeit in den Nacken. Das Gesicht des Manipulus wirkt zutiefst besorgt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fährt wortlos einen mit einem Injektor versehenen Mechadendriten aus und injiziert der armen Seele eine unbekannte goldene Flüssigkeit in den Nacken. Das Gesicht des Manipulus wirkt zutiefst besorgt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sans mot dire, Eogunn tend vers le pauvre bougre une mécadendrite munie d'un injecteur et lui administre une substance dorée non identifiée au niveau du cou. Les traits du manipulus sont figés en un masque de profond chagrin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sans mot dire, Eogunn tend vers le pauvre bougre une mécadendrite munie d'un injecteur et lui administre une substance dorée non identifiée au niveau du cou. Les traits du manipulus sont figés en un masque de profond chagrin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tek kelime etmeden Eogunn, ucu açılmış bir enjektör taşıyan mekadentritini zavallı adama uzatıyor ve boynuna bilinmeyen altın rengi bir sıvı enjekte ediyor. Manipülus'un yüzünde derin bir keder maskesi var.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tek kelime etmeden Eogunn, ucu açılmış bir enjektör taşıyan mekadentritini zavallı adama uzatıyor ve boynuna bilinmeyen altın rengi bir sıvı enjekte ediyor. Manipülus'un yüzünde derin bir keder maskesi var.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンは一言も発することなく、メカデンドライトを伸展させ、注射器をむき出しにして、その哀れな男の首に、黄金色の液体を注入する。マニピュラスの顔は、深い悲しみの仮面を被っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Without uttering a single word, Eogunn extends a mechadendrite, injector bared, toward the poor wretch, administering an unknown golden liquid into his neck. The Manipulus's face is set in a mask of deepest sorrow.{/n}
